description: Issue warning messages and control their disposition.

functions.name: warn

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message string or a Warning instance.

params.name: category
params.description: The warning category class. Must be a subclass of Warning. Defaults to UserWarning.

params.name: stacklevel
params.description: Number of stack frames to go up for the source of the warning. Defaults to 1 (direct caller).

functions.description: Issue a warning, or maybe ignore it or raise an exception. The category argument defaults to UserWarning.

functions.name: warn_explicit
functions.signature: warn_explicit(message, category, filename, lineno[, module[, registry[, module_globals]]])

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message string or Warning instance.

params.name: category
params.description: The warning category class.

params.name: filename
params.description: The file name where the warning is issued.

params.name: lineno
params.description: The line number where the warning is issued.

params.name: module
params.description: The module name. Defaults to filename with .py stripped.

params.name: registry
params.description: An object representing already-delivered warnings for the module.

params.name: module_globals
params.description: The global namespace in effect for the code generating the warning.

functions.description: Low-level interface to the warnings machinery. Issue a warning with explicit source location information.

functions.name: simplefilter

params.name: action
params.description: One of 'error', 'ignore', 'always', 'default', 'module', or 'once'.

params.name: category
params.description: A subclass of Warning. Defaults to Warning (matches all).

params.name: lineno
params.description: Line number to match, or 0 to match all. Defaults to 0.

params.name: append
params.description: If true, add the filter at the end; otherwise insert at the beginning.

functions.description: Insert a simple entry into the list of warnings filters. Matches all modules, unlike filterwarnings().

functions.name: filterwarnings
functions.signature: filterwarnings(action[, message[, category[, module[, lineno[, append]]]]])

params.name: action
params.description: One of 'error', 'ignore', 'always', 'default', 'module', or 'once'.

params.name: message
params.description: A regex pattern to match the warning message. Defaults to '' (match all).

params.name: category
params.description: A subclass of Warning to match. Defaults to Warning.

params.name: module
params.description: A regex pattern to match the module name. Defaults to '' (match all).

params.name: lineno
params.description: Line number to match, or 0 to match all. Defaults to 0.

params.name: append
params.description: If true, add the filter at the end; otherwise insert at the beginning.

functions.description: Insert an entry into the list of warnings filters, controlling which warnings are displayed.

functions.name: resetwarnings
functions.description: Reset the warning filters to an empty list. This discards the effect of all previous calls to filterwarnings().

functions.name: showwarning
functions.signature: showwarning(message, category, filename, lineno[, file[, line]])

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message or Warning instance.

params.name: category
params.description: The warning category class.

params.name: filename
params.description: The source filename.

params.name: lineno
params.description: The source line number.

params.name: file
params.description: The file to write to. Defaults to sys.stderr.

params.name: line
params.description: A line of source code to display. If None, the line is looked up from filename and lineno.

functions.description: Write a warning to a file. The default implementation formats the message and writes it. Can be replaced with a custom function.

functions.name: formatwarning

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message or Warning instance.

params.name: category
params.description: The warning category class.

params.name: filename
params.description: The source filename.

params.name: lineno
params.description: The source line number.

params.name: line
params.description: A line of source code. If None, the line is looked up.

functions.description: Format a warning the standard way. Returns a formatted string.

classes.name: Warning
classes.description: Base class for all warning categories. Subclass of Exception.

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message.

classes.name: UserWarning
classes.description: Default category for warn(). Warnings generated by user code.

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message.

classes.name: DeprecationWarning
classes.description: Warnings about deprecated features. Ignored by default.

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message.

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message.

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message.

classes.name: FutureWarning
classes.description: Warnings about constructs that will change semantically in the future.

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message.

classes.name: PendingDeprecationWarning
classes.description: Warnings about features which will be deprecated in the future. Ignored by default.

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message.

classes.name: ImportWarning
classes.description: Warnings about probable mistakes in module imports. Ignored by default.

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message.

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message.

classes.name: BytesWarning
classes.description: Warnings about bytes and bytearray related issues.

params.name: message
params.description: The warning message.
